source.note: Timeless Dream: Eternal Stove (R1, Amber affix 113509 upgrade[0]): 'ATK increased by 28% of Energy Recharge over the base 100%. You can gain a maximum bonus of 80% ATK. Gain 30% Energy Recharge for 12s after using an Elemental Burst.' The ATK-from-ER conversion uses new eval-time stat-conversion keys atk_from_enerRech_/atk_from_enerRech_cap_ (added 2026-07-15 to damage_evaluator_service.py/damage_evaluator_batch_service.py, mirroring the existing <element>_dmg_from_enerRech_ pattern but targeting atk_ instead). The 30% ER-after-burst proc is baked unconditionally into self_modifiers_json (assumes burst-centric rotation uptime, standard for this codebase's weapon modeling), and its ER also feeds the ATK conversion since apply_bonus_modifiers merges it before apply_stat_conversions runs.
